name: 200 Watt LED Shoebox Light | 26000 Lumens | 5700K
description: 200 Watt LED shoebox light – parking lot light has durable die-cast aluminum housing and stainless steel hardware. The standard optic is Type 3 – perfect for parking lots. The fixture comes in a dark bronze finish. There is also a photocell you can order if you want dusk-to-dawn operation.
short_desc: Key Features Wattage: 200 Lumens: 26000 Lumens Per Watt: 130 Replaces: 400 Watt Metal Halide Voltage: 100V-277V Color Temperature: 5700K CRI: 70+ Dimming: 1-10V Beam Angles: Type 3 Optics: Polycarbonate Lens Lifespan: 50,000 (L70) hours Mounting: Arm or Slip Fitter EPA Rating: 2.1 Fixture Color: Bronze Frequency: 50-60Hz Power Factor: .9 THD: 15% Durable Construction Housing: Die-Cast Aluminum IP Rating: IP65 Operating Temperature: -40°F to +113°F Certifications: UL | Rebate Eligible Warranty: 5 years Measurements Dimensions: 27 in L X 13.11 in W X 6.61 in H Weight: 17 lbs Features/Accessories Photocell Dimming: 1-10V
